header.description: Starts the workflow when MailerLite events occur

subscriber.added_through_webform.description: Fired when a subscriber is added though a form

subscriber.add_to_group.description: Fired when a subscriber is added to a group

subscriber.bounced.description: Fired when an email address bounces

subscriber.complaint.description: Fired when subscriber marks a campaign as a spam

subscriber.create.description: Fired when a new subscriber is added to an account

subscriber.remove_from_group.description: Fired when a subscriber is removed from a group

subscriber.unsubscribe.description: Fired when a subscriber becomes unsubscribed

subscriber.update.description: Fired when any of the subscriber's custom fields are updated
